appearanceNotes: Commanding air-channeler priest with a vivid red beard, ceremonial sky-robes, and a storm-glass staff.
personalityNotes: Zealous, charismatic, forceful, and convinced his rule is divinely mandated.
relationshipSummary: Husband of Priestess Lizkota; father of infant Ruth. Recently usurped the old leaders of the Wind Capital.
notes: Rules the religious theocracy that recently seized power. His sermons have turned the capital into a chaotic center of religious fervor.

appearanceNotes: Severe and elegant air-channeler priestess with silver-blue vestments and prayer ribbons.
personalityNotes: Intelligent, disciplined, politically sharp, and intensely protective of her family.
relationshipSummary: Wife and right hand of High Priest Redbeard; mother of infant Ruth.
notes: The public sees her as the calm voice beside Redbeard, but she is often the sharper strategist behind the theocracy.

appearanceNotes: Infant wrapped in soft white-and-gold swaddling cloths; faint warm mist gathers around her when she cries.
personalityNotes: Too young to judge, but already treated as a living omen by the faithful.
relationshipSummary: Daughter of Redbeard and Lizkota. Her steam channeling is being interpreted as a divine sign.
notes: An infant steam channeler whose existence fuels the capital's religious fervor and political instability.
